title: General Tarfful
content:
{{Top|rwp|sortkey=*General Tarfful}}
'''"General Tarfful"''' co-wrote the backstory of [[Janu Godalhi/Legends|Janu Godalhi]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

==Works==
